subject: CFT fitting range setting for batch pre-processing in Warp
body:
Dear Warp/M users,

Greetings!

How do you set a single CTF fitting range for batch pre-processing in Warp?
Do you group tomograms based on their defocus? Any tips you'd like to
share?

Thank you!

Best regards,

Cyan Ching

PhD student

The Physical Chemistry Curie Lab
